description: Day 2 of the 7-day playbook. Advisor collects an approximate height baseline and places the child in / near / below age band calmly. No alarm, no jump to product. Acquaintance_building primary, guided_exploration tolerable for the data-collection probe.

turns.user_input: 大概一米一出头吧，没有特别精确量过。
这个高度算正常吗？我有点担心。
